Affects: It affects the Justice and Development Party in Morocco.
It affects the Ennahda Movement in Tunisia.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the ruling Justice and Development Party of Turkey.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the ruling Justice and Development Party of Turkey.
ConsistsOf: It consists of compatibility of Islam with democracy.
It consists of a Western-oriented foreign policy.
It consists of secularism within government.
CreatedBy: It was created by the ruling Justice and Development Party of Turkey.
HasA: It has been described as a departure from or moderation of Islamic democracy.
It has the endorsement of more secular and democratic values.
It has been referred to as a floating signifier.
It has been accused of being a red herring.
It has been described as a broad right-wing coalition of Islamists, reformist Islamists, conservatives, nationalists, centre-right, and pro-business groups.
It has been labelled as human rights issues by supporters.
It has been labelled as open attacks on secularism by rivals.
It has been criticized as an attempt to politicize the courts.
It has been limited to social and moral issues.
It has been detrimental to social unity and freedom of thought.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the compatibility of Islam with democracy.
It is characterized by a Western-oriented foreign policy.
It is characterized by neoliberal economics.
It is characterized by secularism within government.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by former Islamist movements.
IsA: It is a label coined by the ruling Justice and Development Party of Turkey.
It is a modernist breakaway party from former Islamist movements.
It is a departure from or moderation of Islamic democracy.
It is an endorsement of more secular and democratic values.
It is a Western-oriented foreign policy.
It is neoliberal economics.
It is secularism within government.
It is a floating signifier.
It is a red herring designed to conceal a hidden Islamist agenda.
It is a reformed, pro-secular conservative democratic ideal.
KnownAs: It is known as Islamic democracy.
KnownFor: It is known for the electoral success of the AKP.
It is known for the neo-Ottoman foreign policy of the AKP.
PartOf: It is part of the ruling Justice and Development Party of Turkey.
UsedFor: It is used for the endorsement of more secular and democratic values.
It is used for broadening Turkey's regional influence.
It is used for the compatibility of Islam with democracy.
It is used for a Western-oriented foreign policy.
It is used for neoliberal economics.
It is used for secularism within government.
It is used for concealing a hidden Islamist agenda.
It is used for maintaining public support.
It is used for protecting democracy.
UsedTo: It is used to describe Islamic democracy.
It is used to describe Islamic democracy.
It is used to conceal a hidden Islamist agenda.
It is used to maintain public support.
It is used to endorse conservative values.
